data.title: [test-create-dso-app.sh]: smoke test uses PATH-stubbing with mocked git (no real clone) -> 404 on missing external template repo never surfaced in CI or sprint validation
data.description:
## Incident Overview

Epic baff-7163 SC8 required 'An automated smoke-test script (tests/scripts/test-create-dso-app.sh) runs the installer end-to-end in a sandboxed temporary directory with mocked dependency checks, and asserts the expected project structure'. The smoke test was built — and it uses PATH-stubbing to mock brew, node, AND git. Because git is stubbed, the real 'git clone' call at scripts/create-dso-app.sh:344 never runs against the real remote. The 404 from the missing navapbc/digital-service-orchestra-nextjs-template repo is therefore invisible to CI and to any sprint validation step.

## Reproduction

1. head -60 tests/scripts/test-create-dso-app.sh — 'Tests use PATH-stubbing to mock brew, node, and other commands'
2. grep -n 'clone\|git' tests/scripts/test-create-dso-app.sh — confirms git is stubbed, no real network calls
3. CI passes; real invocation fails with fatal: repository not found

## Impact

SC8 of baff-7163 was technically satisfied (smoke test exists, asserts project structure), but the test provided false confidence — it cannot detect external-dependency failures by design. This is the mechanism by which bug 0f2a-95c9 (TDD exemption) and bug [completion-verifier] evaded detection: the test that should have caught them was architected to bypass the failing path.

## Root Cause Hypothesis

The smoke test's 'mock all external deps' design trades execution safety for verification fidelity. When a feature's core behavior is 'clone an external public repo', stubbing git clone makes the entire test vacuous with respect to the external dependency. Either the smoke test must include a separate path that exercises the real clone against the real URL, or an additional e2e/integration test must.

## Scope

Surface: tests/scripts/test-create-dso-app.sh, test strategy for installers with external-dependency behavior, CI configuration for network-dependent integration tests.

## References

- tests/scripts/test-create-dso-app.sh (smoke test — all-mocked)
- scripts/create-dso-app.sh:344 (git clone call — never exercised against real URL in CI)
- Companion bugs: 0f2a-95c9 (TDD exemption), and the completion-verifier + URL-drift bugs
